Document:
# Core Rule 1 - Roleplay is required
Treat this game server like DND.
You are expected as a player to roleplay a character, and to add the the overall story of the round. If play with no regard for roleplay, you may be punished. If an admin asks for you to change your playstyle to something more varied and interesting, you are expected to comply. If you join a round you are expected to play, mistakes happen and you can cryo however repeated "AFK joins" will be deemed Antag rolling and dealt with accordingly.
## Examples
### Permitted
- Reacting to police brutality and harsh conditions in ways that could be seen as antagonistic. - Playing a unique and creative character. - Playing a generic and boring character. - Playing a familiar and listening to reasonable requests from the summoner.
### Not Permitted
- Playing wordlessly without interacting with people. - Playing as a character whos sole purpose is to cause issues for others. - Self antagonism without purpose "because its what my character would do." - Using netspeak or NRP language in character. - Joining a round and not playing. - Abandoning your role after joining a round, for example by going AFK or refusing to interact with people.
